Design

The Art of Claymorphism in UI Design

Sohel Rana
•Feb 5, 2024•5 min read
#UI Design#CSS#Claymorphism#Trends

Discover how to create soft, clay-like interfaces that feel tactile and engaging. Learn the principles and techniques behind this emerging design trend.

Introduction

This is a placeholder for the full blog post content. In a real implementation, this would be rendered from MDX content with syntax highlighting for code blocks.

The blog system supports:

  • MDX for rich content authoring
  • Syntax highlighting for code blocks
  • Reading time calculation
  • Categories and tags
  • RSS feed generation

Code Example

// Example code block with syntax highlighting
function greet(name: string) {
    return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

console.log(greet('World'));
